strengths: Direct TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience from re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE Capital — the exact stack the role calls for
Fullstack range spanning databases, REST APIs, microservices, and frontends, plus AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployment experience matching the nice-to-haves
Active work on LLM/AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) directly aligns with the LLM integration nice-to-have
concerns: Profile is Senior/Staff level while the role is entry-level — but this means immediate productivity and mentorship capacity for the team
Berlin-based with strong on-site experience across multiple Berlin employers, fitting the high on-site presence requirement
Only basic German listed, though Berlin tech roles commonly operate in English and his track record shows fast learning
response.justification: The candidate brings exactly the TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relational/PostgreSQL-adjacent fullstack experience the role requires, demonstrated across multiple Berlin product companies including direct AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployments. He also covers every listed nice-to-have — active LLM/agent infrastructure work, AWS services, and container orchestration — meaning the team gains immediate capability in areas they explicitly want to grow. Berlin residency and a long track record of on-site collaboration satisfy the work-environment constraint, and his teaching background (workshops, courses, dojos) signals he will lift teammates as the platform scales.
